title: Recall the double angle formula for sine
text: The double angle formula for sine is $$\sin(2x)$$ $$=$$ $$2\sin(x)\cos(x)$$.

title: Find \sin(x) and \cos(x)
text: Use the given $$\tan(x)$$ and quadrant to find $$\sin(x)$$ and $$\cos(x)$$. $$Consider$$ $$drawing$$ $$a$$ $$right$$ $$triangle$$.
